SEARCH
Package io.github.fiitgame.Projectiles

Class ArcherProjectile

java.lang.Object
io.github.fiitgame.Projectiles.Projectile
io.github.fiitgame.Projectiles.ArcherProjectile
public class ArcherProjectile extends Projectile
Arrow that is faster than the mage projectile but has a limited range. It negatively accelerates over time and disappears when it reaches a certain speed threshold.
